synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0305 Oracle Linux 9 NetworkManager-libreswan bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0305
description:
[1.2.29-1]
- Upgrade to 1.2.29
- Fix error on duplicate key 'phase2alg'. (RHEL-131232)
- Fix import connection with RSA key. (RHEL-127865)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0305

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0305.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
NetworkManager-libreswan-1.2.29-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
NetworkManager-libreswan-gnome-1.2.29-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
NetworkManager-libreswan-1.2.29-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
NetworkManager-libreswan-gnome-1.2.29-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/NetworkManager-libreswan-1.2.29-1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.2.29-1]
- Upgrade to 1.2.29
- Fix error on duplicate key 'phase2alg'. (RHEL-131232)
- Fix import connection with RSA key. (RHEL-127865)
